scripts.e2e: cd e2e && PORT=${PORT:-3000} npx playwright test
scripts.e2e:ui: cd e2e && PORT=${PORT:-3000} npx playwright test --ui
scripts.e2e:headed: cd e2e && PORT=${PORT:-3000} npx playwright test --headed
scripts.e2e:components: cd e2e && PORT=${PORT:-3000} npx playwright test tests/components/
scripts.e2e:hooks: cd e2e && PORT=${PORT:-3000} npx playwright test tests/hooks/
scripts.e2e:smoke: cd e2e && PORT=${PORT:-3000} npx playwright test --grep @smoke
scripts.e2e:fast: cd e2e && PORT=${PORT:-3000} npx playwright test --workers=16 --retries=0
